title: AI Report Generator
description: Let AI Agent build a report generation system in NocoBase, while AI employees extract data insights, key findings, and multi-format reports.
description_cn: 让 AI Agent 在 NocoBase 搭建报告生成系统，AI 员工负责提炼数据、关键发现与多格式报告。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build an application with NocoBase — AI Report Generator: report task management, business categories, key finding extraction, confidence review, multi-format report export, and AI-generated analysis charts. Use this prototype as the layout and signature visual reference: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/57-ai-report-generator.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— AI 报告生成系统:报告任务管理、业务分类、关键发现提取、置信度审核、多格式报告导出和 AI 分析图表。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/57-ai-report-generator.html
featureList:
Report task management
Business categories
Key finding extraction
Confidence review
Multi-format report export
AI-generated analysis charts
about:
ai report generator
Operations
AI no-code app builder
internal tools
NocoBase
